title: WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: The Wildlife Institute of India (WII) has published the Scientific Consultant Grade – I Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 position. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science, Zoology, Ecology, Environmental Sciences, Geoinformatics, Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects, or BE/B.Tech in an equivalent subject with 5–10 years of relevant experience are eligible to apply online at https://www.wii.gov.in. The application process will be active from 20 May 2026 to 03 June 2026, and candidates can easily

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: up to 5 years OBC: up to 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects from a recognized institute/University or BE/B Tech in equivalent subject with Five – Ten years of experience.
qualification.details: Scientific Consultant Grade - I: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Wildlife Science/ Zoology/ Ecology/ Environmental Sciences/ Geoinformatics/ Life Sciences) or equivalent subjects from a recognized institute/ University or BE/B Tech in equivalent subject and Five – Ten years of experience.

salary_details.details: Scientific Consultant Grade - I: Rs. 90,000/- (Consolidated) per month

selection_process: Online interview Verification of original documents
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the WII Scientific Consultant Grade – I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of WII to complete the application.
